_comment: EXAMPLE ONLY — this template is committed for reference. The real file (ADS_LAUNCH_APPROVAL.json) must ONLY ever be created and committed by the human founder, never by an agent. See ads/compliance/README.md. Until the real file exists, every campaign stays PAUSED.
_comment_retargeting: Retargeting and Spark campaigns intentionally absent from this example — they are only added once pixel/audiences exist (retargeting) and final creator videos are re-reviewed (Spark).
acknowledgement: I approve these campaigns to go live and understand they may spend real money.
